Bash(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer vcp_49VaZfBvYdOaZDGMiLmfGoAXSCDwr0UeEEqlPaAwu8KQyn4IiX01GmqT" "https://api.vercel.com/v6/deployments?projectId=prj_6oXLbXCJubuOMxeZIAg89fw1gDMF&teamId=team_9aYvnhHwLiazNz7OoE8BsRVC&limit=5" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for dep in d.get\('deployments',[]\):
    print\(f'{dep[\\"created\\"]}  {dep[\\"state\\"]}  {dep.get\(\\"meta\\",{}\).get\(\\"githubCommitMessage\\",\\"n/a\\"\)[:80]}  {dep[\\"url\\"]}'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer vcp_49VaZfBvYdOaZDGMiLmfGoAXSCDwr0UeEEqlPaAwu8KQyn4IiX01GmqT" "https://api.vercel.com/v6/deployments?projectId=prj_6oXLbXCJubuOMxeZIAg89fw1gDMF&teamId=team_9aYvnhHwLiazNz7OoE8BsRVC&limit=3" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json,datetime
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for dep in d.get\('deployments',[]\):
    ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(dep['created']/1000\)
    meta = dep.get\('meta',{}\)
    print\(f'{ts}  {dep[\\"state\\"]}  commit={meta.get\(\\"githubCommitSha\\",\\"none\\"\)[:8]}  ref={meta.get\(\\"githubCommitRef\\",\\"none\\"\)}  msg={meta.get\(\\"githubCommitMessage\\",\\"n/a\\"\)[:60]}'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer vcp_49VaZfBvYdOaZDGMiLmfGoAXSCDwr0UeEEqlPaAwu8KQyn4IiX01GmqT" "https://api.vercel.com/v6/deployments?projectId=prj_6oXLbXCJubuOMxeZIAg89fw1gDMF&teamId=team_9aYvnhHwLiazNz7OoE8BsRVC&limit=1" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['deployments'][0]['uid']\)")

Bash(curl -s -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer vcp_49VaZfBvYdOaZDGMiLmfGoAXSCDwr0UeEEqlPaAwu8KQyn4IiX01GmqT" -H "Content-Type: application/json" "https://api.vercel.com/v9/projects/prj_6oXLbXCJubuOMxeZIAg89fw1gDMF/env/BdzkUr9IzVukLclY?teamId=team_9aYvnhHwLiazNz7OoE8BsRVC" -d '{"value":"https://helloagain-three.vercel.app"}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "

print\(f'Updated: {d.get\(\\"key\\"\)} = {d.get\(\\"value\\",\\"done\\"\)}  target={d.get\(\\"target\\",[]\)}'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer vcp_49VaZfBvYdOaZDGMiLmfGoAXSCDwr0UeEEqlPaAwu8KQyn4IiX01GmqT" "https://api.vercel.com/v1/projects/prj_6oXLbXCJubuOMxeZIAg89fw1gDMF/logs?teamId=team_9aYvnhHwLiazNz7OoE8BsRVC&limit=50&source=lambda" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for log in d if isinstance\(d, list\) else d.get\('logs', d.get\('data', []\)\):
    msg = log.get\('message',''\) if isinstance\(log,dict\) else str\(log\)
    if msg:
        print\(msg[:200]\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "turbo run dev" 2>/dev/null; echo "done")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\(''''scripts'''',{}\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in s.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in [''''type'''',''''check'''',''''tsc'''']\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in [''''main'''',''''types'''',''''exports'''',''''scripts''''] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 4668 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; $p = netstat -ano | Select-String ':3000.*LISTENING'; if \($p\) { 'still running' } else { 'port free' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'done'")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(s, indent=2\)\) for s in data if s.get\(''''name'''',''''''''\)==''''git'''']")
